prompt: Locate the same statue in the source and crop the scene around it.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the source image. Crop the scene to closely frame the Statue of Liberty, using image 2 as a reference for the desired composition. The edited image should focus predominantly on the statue and its immediate pedestal, largely excluding the distant background, the water, and the crowd of people at the bottom of image 1.
objects: Torch of the Statue of Liberty
Crown of the Statue of Liberty
Tablet of the Statue of Liberty
Immediate pedestal of the Statue of Liberty
Crowd of people (should not be present)
